'''Glarc Leapfar''' was a [[Nosaurian/Legends|Nosaurian]] poacher of [[Clan Leapfar]] from [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]]. He led a gang of poachers who collected [[Rikknit/Legends|rikknit]] [[Egg/Legends|ovum]] sacs. However, he respected nature and was always careful not to disturb the balance of the ecosystem or harm the rikknit. Leapfar was a skilled and strong [[Tree/Legends|tree]]-fighter, and few tried to compete with him.<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Char-stub}}
